name: Grandma's Potato Pone
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 1 cup white sugar, 1 cup cane molasses, 1/2 cup butter (or margarine), melted, 1 cup heavy cream, 4 eggs (well beaten), 1/2 cup all-purpose flour, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg.
2. Add 3 cups grated raw potatoes and 3 cups yams to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Grease an ovenproof skillet and pour the batter into it. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until set.
4. Allow the dish to cool before slicing as you would cake.
